equipmentMods.belt: Lightning Totems: Totems will now summon two additional Lightning bolts.
equipmentMods.bracer: Increased 10% chance to spawn a container when killing an elite.
equipmentMods.goblet: Static Charge: Static charge will now stay for an additional 0.6 seconds, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 5% per enemy inside Static Charge range.
equipmentMods.horn: Static Charge: Static Charge increase it's damaging radius by 20%. Thunderbolt have 33% chance to deal an additional 30% Damage base on Static Charge time.
equipmentMods.trinket: Static Charge: Gain charges by damaging foes. Each charge adds 1% lightning damage. At 100 charges, summon thunderbolts across the battlefield.

equipmentMods.belt: Death Blade: Summon a smaller Death Blade that circles around the primary Death Blade and deals 130% damage. Each time a small death blade spawns, it adds 15% damage to Arcane spike.
equipmentMods.goblet: Burning Shield: Surrounds your shields with Fire Swords, increasing the damage by 60% and radius by 33%.
equipmentMods.horn: Burning Shield: Burning shield becomes a legendary fire shield, increasing its size by 10% and damage by 30% and grants a Blessing that gives 1% Fire Damage and 1% Armor, stacks up to 75.
equipmentMods.relic: Gain an 8% chance to spawn Mecha Golems, dealing Fire Damage infront of them for 6 seconds. Mecha Golems benefit from your Fire Damage bonus
equipmentMods.trinket: Fire Beam: Gain three additional beams.

equipmentMods.belt: Toxicity: Your poisonous pool increases in size by 25%.
equipmentMods.goblet: Blood Dragons: The dragons grow 25% larger and affect a wider area.
equipmentMods.horn: Blood Dragons: The dragons jump towards the player, and deal bonus damage the closer they are to their target up to +100%.
equipmentMods.trinket: Blood Dragons: Dragons gain a 25% chance to trigger a Dragon Burst that deals 200% damage. Dragon Burst deals an additional 33% based on dragon size.
